name: hackernews
description: A browser extension that replaces the HackerNews UI with a cleaner, more modern design.

scripts.build: BUILD_TARGET=content vite build && BUILD_TARGET=background vite build
scripts.build:firefox: BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode firefox && BUILD_TARGET=background vite build --mode firefox
scripts.build:chromium: BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode chromium && BUILD_TARGET=background vite build --mode chromium
